overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player character traverses a covered pedestrian walkway, ascends a stairway, and walks along neon-lit city streets surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, passing vending machines and concrete barriers while approaching a yellow staircase

entered.detail: large holographic screen displaying a woman against a green background mounted on a concrete pillar
tall concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway with trash scattered at its base
elevated highway or monorail track overhead creating a covered corridor effect
tall skyscraper visible in the distance with distinctive red illuminated crown at the top
yellow-painted concrete staircase leading upward to street level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dimly lit pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The path is flanked by a concrete barrier wall on the right and building walls on the left, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. The player walks forward toward a yellow staircase while passing vending machines and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase ascending from underpass to street level

events.description: begins ascending the yellow-painted concrete staircase
reaches the top of the stairs and emerges from the enclosed underpass into the open city street

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow stairs while holding the railing, transitioning from the lower walkway to street level

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with yellow painted sides and metal handrails
yellow metal handrails along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a steep yellow staircase enclosed by concrete walls, transitioning from the covered walkway below to the street level above. The environment shifts from the dim underpass to reveal the glowing neon skyline of the city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with wet pavement reflecting neon lights

events.description: exits the stairwell into an open intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers
turns left and steps onto the sidewalk from the open street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet asphalt intersection and turning onto the sidewalk, navigating around construction barriers

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting the colorful neon lights from surrounding buildings
towering futuristic buildings covered in holographic advertisements and glowing windows
black metal security fence lining the right side of the sidewalk
concrete and metal construction barriers blocking off part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a vast urban intersection surrounded by colossal neon-lit towers. The wet pavement mirrors the vibrant city lights as the player crosses the street and turns onto a sidewalk lined with construction fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food stalls and construction barriers

events.description: passes by a brightly lit food stall with visible steam and signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past pedestrians, food vendors, and construction zones while admiring the neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead of the player

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign with white text reading COMBAT CAB mounted on a building
small street vendor stall with bright interior lighting and visible menu displays
palm trees planted in concrete planters along the sidewalk edge
red and white striped plastic barriers blocking off construction areas

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk through a bustling commercial district. The player passes food stalls, construction barriers, and groups of pedestrians while the iconic COMBAT CAB sign glows red on the right. Palm trees in planters and scattered debris line the path as the neon-lit towers loom overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, enclosed underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city center. It begins on a dimly lit pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past vending machines and digital billboards toward a yellow staircase. As the camera ascends the steep stairs, the environment shifts from the oppressive concrete of the underpass to reveal the glowing skyline of the metropolis above. The scene then opens into a vast urban intersection where wet pavement mirrors the colossal neon towers, before the camera turns onto a sidewalk lined with construction fencing. Finally, the movement continues through a bustling commercial district past food stalls and pedestrians, passing under the red glow of a Combat Cab sign as towering skyscrapers loom overhead.
